loopbacks.reason: Test-design found a CONV-022 trap in REQ-007's acceptance: it demands a frozen structural test pinning package.json dependencies/devDependencies as an equality baseline ('no new entries vs the F16 set'). Parallel batch-3 sibling F18 (agent replay) will legitimately add @xterm/headless (+ serialize addon) — at the post-merge batch re-gate that equality pin false-positives an unrelated frozen suite, exactly the CONV-022/CONV-012 class. Fix: scope the acceptance to F19's own invariant — deps must contain NO ssh-implementation package (ssh2/node-ssh/simple-ssh/ssh2-*/libssh*) and src/remote-client import specifiers must not reference one — which is the actual locked-decision-1 requirement and immune to sibling drift. Spec-only wording change to REQ-007 acceptance; no requirement semantics change.

Review filed 4 code-addressable findings (none blocking, fixed eagerly in thorough mode): FINDING-001 sanitize control chars out of stderr excerpts before they enter diagnostics; FINDING-002 reject '..' traversal segments in remote paths; FINDING-003 unique per-call temp suffix for saveNamedAgents (concurrent-save torn-file race); diagnostic halves of FINDING-004 (name the node-missing possibility in the provision-ineffective/absent diagnostics) and FINDING-006 (hint shell-rc stdout noise on pre-hello decode failures). All are production-code-only; the frozen suite is untouched (no pinned string changes — diagnostics under test only via loose toMatch patterns). Implement gate will re-derive build+test+freezes on the fixed tree.

Traceability gate: TEST-2027/TEST-2028 (REQ-014) are real tests in tests/remote-client-bootstrap.test.ts but their describe label used a range form 'TEST-2026..TEST-2029' that elides the two inner id literals, so the mechanical marker check cannot find them. Label-only tests-phase fix: put each test's own TEST-id in its it() title (no assertion/semantic change; suite stays green — freeze re-capture per the 0017 precedent).

implementer.reason: Re-entry after the doc-sync-driven tests loopback (TEST-2027/2028 label literals): no production-code change; implement gate re-derived green (build+test+freezes) on the identical tree with the re-captured test freeze.
